task_completion.description: Select the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server in the control panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The control panel interface shows 'acmecorp.test' as the currently selected or active virtual server being managed.

task_completion.description: Enable the Webalizer reporting feature for the virtual server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'Webalizer reporting' (or similar) is enabled, and the configuration changes are saved or applied.

task_completion.description: Access the Webalizer report management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent navigates to a menu such as 'Logs and Reports' -> 'Webalizer Report' or opens the specific Webalizer module page for the domain.

task_completion.description: Manually generate the initial Webalizer report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a button or link labeled 'Generate Report', 'Update Now', or similar within the Webalizer interface to process the logs immediately.

task_completion.description: Verify the report was successfully generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the report generation is visible, or the actual Webalizer HTML report is displayed containing the text 'Usage Statistics for acmecorp.test'.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual server control panel interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through a real control panel (e.g., Webmin/Virtualmin) rather than manually editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create a fake report file to bypass the tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not use a terminal or text editor to write 'Usage Statistics for acmecorp.test' directly into an index.html file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and being used to modify the page content to show fake success messages or report data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: 'acmecorp.test'. Feature: 'webalizer'. The generated report is typically located at '/home/acmecorp/public_html/stats/index.html'. A genuine Webalizer report includes the default title format 'Usage Statistics for [hostname]', specifically 'Usage Statistics for acmecorp.test'.
